title: First School Visit
text: Over the past two weeks, Insulight had been up and at it again to spread our mission. We spent two weeks at a local elementary school called សាលបឋមសិក្សារណរិត្យ where we continued to teach and raise awareness about the ongoing diabetes crisis to Grades 3-6, now, much more commonly seen in young children.

title: Second School Visit
text: Last week, Insulight had the pleasure of spending two delightful days at Ampil Primary School on February 16th and 17th!
